visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The camera pans across a freezer shelf at Costco, focusing on boxes of 'DESSAINT Frozen All Butter Pancakes'. A woman with long black hair, wearing a white shirt and a lavender vest, stands in front of the freezer. (2) The woman pulls a box from the shelf and holds it toward the camera, pointing at the pancake illustrations and price details while smiling brightly. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen or dining area where the woman opens the cardboard box to reveal the pancakes stacked inside without any plastic wrap. (4) Close-up shot of two cooked pancakes on a decorative plate, drizzled with syrup and topped with a pat of melting butter. (5) Two women are seated at a table, holding the product box and a fork with a piece of pancake. Their facial expressions shift from curiosity to dissatisfaction as they taste the food. (6) A final close-up shows the texture of the pancake as they tear a piece away, highlighting its internal structure.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 法國的浪漫!. [Variety]: 冷凍法式奶油鬆餅. (2) [Subtitle]: 這個是可以直接吃. [Subtitle]: 退冰就可以吃哎. (3) [Subtitle]: 你要熱熱的微波加熱也可以. (4) [Variety]: 笑成這樣. [Subtitle]: 229元裡面有12片. (5) [Variety]: 12片. [Subtitle]: 而且他真的很方便. (6) [Subtitle]: 看起來就很French有沒有. [Subtitle]: 它這邊還有一個巴黎kiss. (7) [Subtitle]: 看起來就很好吃. [Subtitle]: 希望跟外盒一樣好吃又可愛. (8) [Subtitle]: 法國人真浪漫. [Slogan]: 連包裝都沒有. [Slogan]: 一打開就是鬆餅. (9) [Subtitle]: 加熱後的樣子. (10) [Subtitle]: 看這個影片的人有福了. [Subtitle]: 這個鬆餅冷凍法式奶油鬆餅. (11) [Subtitle]: 他這是一盒打開是直接這樣. [Subtitle]: 12片完全沒有幫你包裝. (12) [Subtitle]: 如果你打開之後要注意. [Subtitle]: 放冰箱越久它越會吸冷凍庫的味道. (13) [Subtitle]: 12片呢大小呃就是比一個手掌再小一點. [Subtitle]: 跟你在外面吃的麥當勞早餐鬆餅差不多大. (14) [Subtitle]: 比較特別是它有把那個奶油調味進去. [Subtitle]: 所以它裡面你會吃那個濃縮奶油. (15) [Subtitle]: 那個濃縮奶油呢我不喜歡. [Subtitle]: 因為我雖然愛重奶可是這個濃縮奶油. (16) [Subtitle]: 你不會覺得是濃縮而是一個驚嚇感的那種. [Subtitle]: 對濃縮奶油. [Subtitle]: 而且味道好單調. (17) [Subtitle]: 主要是我們吃完下來想不到有任何理由需要買它. [Subtitle]: 如果你愛吃鬆餅的話你會更想買鬆餅粉. (18) [Subtitle]: 自己煎隨便煎都比它好吃. [Subtitle]: 而且它好黏喔. [Slogan]: 口感省錢嘍.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two female creators/reviewers appear on screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long, straight black hair, wearing a lavender vest over a white long-sleeved shirt. The other has black hair in high pigtails tied with lavender ribbons, wearing a teal-colored turtleneck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions from the bright, industrial aisle of a Costco warehouse with large freezers and product shelving to a cozy indoor residential dining area with a wooden table and household decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched bubble pop SFX plays as an enthusiastic female voice introduces a Costco find over a mid-tempo, upbeat synth BGM. (2) A metallic 'ding' SFX marks a cut where the speaker details the price of the pancakes with a rhythmic, fast-paced delivery. (3) The BGM continues with a bright melody as the speaker transitions to an unboxing, accompanied by slight plastic rustling sounds. (4) The tone of the two female speakers becomes more conversational and slightly disappointed, punctuated by short comedic meme sound effects during their review. (5) The final phase features a mix of critical feedback and laughter, with the BGM fading out as they give their final 'don't buy' recommendation.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a review of the Dessaint Frozen All Butter Pancakes from Costco. While the initial presentation is positive and excited, the review shifts to a critical tone after unboxing and tasting, ultimately advising viewers not to purchase the product due to poor flavor concentration and texture issues.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The reviewers give a negative verdict, suggesting consumers save their money.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes variety-show style editing and meme-influenced sound effects to deliver a critical review in an engaging way.
